case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. CINDY LEE HERRMANN

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-26-2019 - JUDGMENT. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CINDY LEE HERRMAN IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $50.00) SERVED JUL-16-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT HERRMANN, CINDY LEE
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SOFIA REYES, LEGAL COLLECTION SPECIALIST FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT HERRMANN, CINDY LEE $540.57 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $620.57 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $640.57 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT HERRMANN, CINDY LEE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-26-2019 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
